text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The weather forecast called for clear skies
today, but perhaps I should purchase an umbrella
before heading home.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Then again, I've heard Japanese weather reports
are remarkably accurate.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I shall put my trust in it today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the sky grows darker by the minute
until...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Argh! This is horrible! It wasn't supposed to rain
today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash's clothes and spirit are thoroughly
drenched as the rain douses her.
